ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Scuffle Time Mr. Buu.' The large pink rotund figure in white-and-purple vest with antennae, delivering a punch, is the canonical visual design of Good Buu / Mr. Buu — pink skin, round head, antennae, white vest with purple trim are all signature visual identifiers. Character name is in the title.

trivia_bullets.text: TB2-028 is a Common card from the World Martial Arts Tournament themed booster (DBS-TB02), the second themed expansion for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released September 21, 2018 [WebSearch: DBS TB02 release date]. The TB2 set is built around the World Martial Arts Tournament as recurring tournament arc, themed around competition rather than saga-specific combat — hence 'Scuffle Time' rather than a crisis framing.
sources: WebSearch: DBS TB02 World Martial Arts Tournament release date

trivia_bullets.text: Scuffle Time Mr. Buu (TB2-028) has the Barrier keyword, preventing it from being chosen by opponent card effects. Its triggered ability fires when placed at the bottom of its owner's deck: if Scuffle Time Son Goten (TB2-022) is in the Battle Area, return one opponent Battle Card to hand. The two 'Scuffle Time' cards form an explicit synergy pair — Mr. Buu enables Son Goten's power boost and Active Mode switch; Son Goten's presence enables Mr. Buu's removal trigger [WebSearch: Scuffle Time Son Goten TB2 synergy, CoreTCG product descriptions].
sources: WebSearch: Scuffle Time Son Goten TB2 synergy
CoreTCG: Scuffle Time Mr. Buu TB2-028
CoreTCG: Scuffle Time Son Goten TB2-022

trivia_bullets.text: Good Buu (Mr. Buu) is the reformed version of Majin Buu that split from Innocent Buu — the Good and Evil halves separated by fission, with Evil Buu eventually absorbing Good Buu into Super Buu. Post-defeat, Good Buu was given the name Mr. Buu by the main cast, trained under Mr. Satan, and became a permanent ally and martial arts competitor in the Z Fighters circle through Dragon Ball Super [Wikipedia: Majin Buu, Dragon Ball Fandom: Good Buu].

related_cards.note: Mr. Satan is Buu's moral reformer and trainer; frequent paired character in tournament sets
